name: mcp-chat-template
description: Embeddable MCP chat widget + Ollama host + MCP tool server template

scripts.dev: pnpm build && concurrently -n mcp,api,web -c magenta,blue,green "pnpm dev:mcp" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: pnpm build && concurrently -n mcp,api,sample,web -c magenta,blue,yellow,green "pnpm dev:mcp" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:sample" "pnpm dev:web"
